title: BanHammer+
description: They broke the rules, you break their game.
body:
# 🔨 BanHammer+

A lightweight server administration plugin built on **[ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)**, allowing administrators to instantly crash a target player's client through a single command.  
It is the ultimate tool for quickly handling cheaters, griefers, or malicious players who disrupt your community.

---

## ✨ Features
- **Instant Termination**: Force a target player's Minecraft client to crash immediately using the `/crash` command.
- **Packet-Level Precision**: Powered by ProtocolLib for reliable and high-performance packet handling.
- **Minimalist Design**: Extremely lightweight with no unnecessary performance overhead on your server.
- **Staff-Only Access**: Fully permission-based to ensure only authorized administrators can wield this power.

---

## 🔧 Commands & Permissions

### Command
- `/crash <player>`
  - **Description**: Sends a malicious packet sequence to force the specified player's client to encounter a fatal error and close.

### Permission
- `superban.crash`
  - **Default**: OP
  - **Description**: Grants access to the `/crash` command.

---

## 📦 Dependencies
This plugin **requires** the following to function properly:
- **[ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)** (Ensure you use a version compatible with your server core).

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes
- **Use Responsibly**: This plugin forces a client-side crash. It should be used as a serious administrative tool, not for pranks.
- **Intended Use**: Specifically designed for handling severe rule-breakers where a standard kick or ban isn't enough to stop the immediate disruption.
- **No Support for Malicious Use**: The developer is not responsible for any misuse of this tool.

---

## 🚀 Support
If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please feel free to open an issue on the project's repository.
